productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Bright Assorted Combo Pack Socks
description: Pack of two pairs of socks With a supportive ankle Fit and crafted from soft blended cotton, these socks from Reid and Taylor make for a great buy. And what better way to double your comfort level with this two-pack that has two pairs of black socks. Made of soft ribbed cotton for a secure fit and exemplary comfort Cushioned footbed for absolute shock absorption and enhanced comfort Softly elasticated broad cuff Sock care Machine wash in warm water using a mild detergent Use non-chlorine bleach if needed Tumble dry low in a delicate cycle Do not iron
